hooks.command: if echo '$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH' | grep -qE 'signals/|training/|evaluation/'; then echo '[HOOK] Signal/training file — run /no-lookahead before committing'; fi
if echo '$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH' | grep -qE 'fee_model|execution|position_siz'; then echo '[HOOK] Critical execution file — run /fee-review before committing'; fi
if echo '$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT' | grep -qE 'rm -rf|DROP TABLE'; then echo 'BLOCKED' && exit 1; fi
